channel.title: Legal Tech News Feed
channel.description: The RSS Feed powering the Suffolk LIT Lab's Law + Tech News Bot.

item.title: Why You’re A Hypocrite
item.description:
What's a person to believe? The post Why You’re A Hypocrite appeared first on Above the Law.

Source feed: https://abovethelaw.com/feed/

item.title: UK to ban social media for kids under 16, may impose overnight curfews
item.description:
Critics say bans push kids to riskier alternatives and can be beaten with VPNs.

Source feed: http://feeds.arstechnica.com/arstechnica/index

item.title: Trump DOJ Friday News Dumps Its Approval Of The Job-Killing Paramount, Warner Bros Merger
item.description:
The Trump “Department of Justice’s” “antitrust division” dumped its unsurprising approval of the terrible Paramount Warner Brothers merger late on Friday in the hopes people wouldn’t notice it. As we’ve noted the $111 billion megadeal is a historically harmful mess. Backed by billions in Saudi and Chinese cash (raising all sorts of foreign media influence […]

Source feed: https://www.techdirt.com/feed/

item.title: Fox wants to take over your TV — and the tech inside it
item.description:
Fox is about to take over the TVs in more than 100 million homes worldwide. On Monday, Fox announced that it's acquiring Roku, the streaming middleman that serves as a portal for viewers to hop into services like Netflix, Disney Plus, Hulu, and more. The $22 billion deal may not change Roku's familiar purple interface, […]

Source feed: https://www.theverge.com/rss/index.xml

item.title: The ‘New’ Magic Circle Is Here, And U.S. Firms Dominate List
item.description:
A fresh take on London's legal elite puts American firms firmly in the spotlight. The post The ‘New’ Magic Circle Is Here, And U.S. Firms Dominate List appeared first on Above the Law.

Source feed: https://abovethelaw.com/feed/
